<?php namespace Test; use PayPalCheckoutSdk\Core\PayPalHttpClient; use PayPalCheckoutSdk\Core\SandboxEnvironment; ini_set('error_reporting', E_ALL); // or error_reporting(E_ALL); ini_set('display_errors', '1'); ini_set('display_startup_errors', '1'); class TestHarness { public static function client() { return new PayPalHttpClient(self::environment()); } public static function environment() { $clientId = getenv("CLIENT_ID") ?: "<<PAYPAL-CLIENT-ID>>"; $clientSecret = getenv("CLIENT_SECRET") ?: "<<PAYPAL-CLIENT-SECRET>>"; return new SandboxEnvironment($clientId, $clientSecret); } }
